ShortDescription: Continuous AI-orchestrated code, secrets, container, and infrastructure compliance scanner with auto-remediations.
LongDescription: OmniGuard is a unified enterprise DevSecOps platform providing continuous monitoring for developer workspace environments. Blending static analysis with multi-tier AI execution, OmniGuard automatically detects, explains, and writes code fixes for secrets leaks, SAST vulnerabilities, container issues, and cloud configuration exposures.
